actions.title: Mediterranean Diet Protocol
actions.description: Increase intake of olive oil, fatty fish, legumes, and vegetables. Reduce processed foods and refined carbohydrates.

actions.title: Omega-3 Supplementation
actions.description: Supplement with 2-3g EPA/DHA daily to reduce systemic inflammation and support cardiovascular health.

actions.title: Sleep Optimization Protocol
actions.description: Cool bedroom to 18 degrees. No screens 1 hour before bed. Consistent sleep schedule 7-9 hours.

actions.title: HRV Recovery Tracking
actions.description: Track HRV daily to monitor recovery status and adjust training intensity accordingly.

actions.title: Zone 2 Cardio Training
actions.description: 45-60 minutes of low intensity cardio 3-4x per week to improve mitochondrial function and VO2 max.

actions.title: Progressive Resistance Training
actions.description: Structured strength training 3-4x per week with progressive overload to preserve muscle mass.

actions.title: Daily Step Goal
actions.description: Aim for 8000-10000 steps per day to reduce sedentary time and improve metabolic health.

actions.title: Mindfulness Meditation
actions.description: 10-20 minutes of daily meditation to reduce cortisol levels and improve stress resilience.

actions.title: Breathwork Protocol
actions.description: Box breathing or 4-7-8 breathing technique twice daily to activate parasympathetic nervous system.

actions.title: Cognitive Training Program
actions.description: Daily brain training exercises combined with learning new skills to improve focus and memory.

actions.title: Caffeine Optimization
actions.description: Delay caffeine intake 90 minutes after waking. Avoid caffeine after 2pm to protect sleep quality.

actions.title: Anti-Inflammatory Diet
actions.description: Eliminate vegetable oils and fried foods. Increase turmeric, ginger and polyphenol rich foods.

actions.title: CRP Monitoring Protocol
actions.description: Regular hs-CRP testing every 3 months to track systemic inflammation levels.

actions.title: Blood Sugar Management
actions.description: Reduce refined carbohydrates and add protein to every meal to stabilize blood glucose levels.

actions.title: Intermittent Fasting Protocol
actions.description: 16:8 intermittent fasting to improve insulin sensitivity and metabolic flexibility.

actions.title: Blood Pressure Management
actions.description: Reduce sodium intake, increase potassium rich foods, and add 30 minutes of daily walking.

actions.title: ApoB Reduction Protocol
actions.description: Reduce saturated fat intake and increase soluble fiber to lower ApoB levels.

actions.title: Gut Microbiome Support
actions.description: Add fermented foods, prebiotic fiber and reduce processed foods to improve gut diversity.

actions.title: Vitamin D3 & K2 Protocol
actions.description: Supplement with 4000 IU Vitamin D3 and 100mcg K2 daily to support bone and cardiovascular health.

actions.title: Protein Optimization
actions.description: Increase protein intake to 1.6-2.2g per kg body weight daily to support muscle preservation and recovery.
